title: anogra pallida
intro_study: According to the given study, Anogeissus (also referred to as Anogra pallida) benefits include having antioxidant, antimicrobial, wound healing, antiulcer, anti-inflammation, anti-diabetics, hepatoprotective, hypolipidemic, antiparasitic and neuroprotective effects.
side_effects: Anogra pallida can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, it can cause respiratory failure, liver damage, and even coma if ingested in large quantities. Prolonged exposure to its extracts may also lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate. Furthermore, using Anogra pallida without medical supervision can interact with other medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
